baseVariables.name: base-accent-color
baseVariables.usage: Accent color used for focus ring and (when no itemStyles) the active state

baseVariables.name: base-primary-bg
baseVariables.usage: Background of the off / unselected switch surface (preferred name)

baseVariables.name: base-disabled-bg
baseVariables.usage: Fallback for off / unselected switch surface when --base-primary-bg is not set

baseVariables.name: base-text-color-on-accent
baseVariables.usage: Thumb fill — must contrast with the switch surface in any theme (typically white)

baseVariables.name: base-border-radius-sm
baseVariables.usage: Corner radius of the switch shell, thumb, and step segments

baseVariables.name: base-font-size-sm
baseVariables.usage: Base font size for default labels (scales with switch size)

componentVariables.name: switch-bg-off
componentVariables.usage: Switch background when off / not on selected step

componentVariables.name: switch-thumb-border-color
componentVariables.usage: Thumb border color (defaults to transparent — set per-theme/per-instance when a visible outline is wanted)

componentVariables.name: switch-border-radius
componentVariables.usage: Corner radius for switch, thumb, and step segments

componentVariables.name: steps
componentVariables.usage: Number of steps in MultiSwitch (auto-set from props)
